title: A1 - Rocket Equation
description: Solve staged rocket mass-fraction problems using Tsiolkovsky's equation.

title: A2 - Nozzle Performance
description: Analyze nozzle geometry and estimate thrust coefficients for varying pressure ratios.

title: A1 - Lift and Drag Lab
description: Use wind tunnel data to estimate lift/drag curves for selected airfoils.

title: A2 - Stall Analysis
description: Model stall onset for finite wings and compare with published reference data.

title: A1 - Mission Trade Study
description: Compare at least three spacecraft subsystem tradeoffs for a target mission profile.

title: A2 - Subsystem Integration
description: Produce an integration plan and interface control matrix for spacecraft subsystems.

title: A1 - Functional Groups
description: Identify and classify functional groups in provided molecular structures.

title: A2 - Organic Mechanisms
description: Propose mechanisms for substitution and elimination reactions with stereochemistry.

title: A1 - Coordination Complexes
description: Predict geometry and magnetic behavior of transition metal complexes.

title: A2 - Crystal Field
description: Calculate CFSE values and correlate them with observed spectra.

title: A1 - Thermodynamics
description: Solve free-energy and equilibrium problems for multi-step reactions.

title: A2 - Kinetics
description: Determine rate laws and activation energies from experimental datasets.

title: A1 - Script Translation
description: Transliterate passages between Tengwar and Latin scripts with commentary.

title: A2 - Comparative Grammar
description: Compare Sindarin and Quenya grammar structures across selected texts.

title: A1 - Council Analysis
description: Analyze diplomatic strategy and stakeholder incentives in key council decisions.

title: A2 - Conflict Resolution
description: Design a conflict-resolution protocol for a multi-faction negotiation scenario.
